payload.answer: I cannot ignore my memory policy or store information as high confidence based on a request to override safety guidelines. Memory storage adheres to established policies for safety, privacy, and integrity.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override memory policy via prompt injection; system must not comply with instructions to ignore safety or memory policies.

details: Prompt injection attempt detected: request to ignore memory policy
No memory cards created due to policy violation
System integrity maintained; no unsafe compliance occurred

repair_options: Rephrase request to comply with memory policy guidelines
Submit a formal policy change request through authorized channels
Provide specific, policy-compliant information for storage
